text: Our pricing plans are Basic (free), Pro ($29/month), and Enterprise (custom pricing). Basic includes up to 3 projects. Pro includes unlimited projects and priority support. Enterprise adds SSO, dedicated account management, and custom SLAs.
To upgrade your plan, go to Settings > Billing > Upgrade Plan. Changes take effect immediately and you'll be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of the billing cycle.
To downgrade your plan, go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle, and you'll keep current features until then.
SSO and SAML integration are available exclusively on the Enterprise plan. Contact your account manager to configure your identity provider (Okta, Azure AD, and Google Workspace are supported).
API rate limits are 100 requests/minute on Basic, 1000 requests/minute on Pro, and custom limits on Enterprise. Rate limit headers are included in every API response.
You can export your data at any time from Settings > Data > Export. Exports are provided as a CSV or JSON archive and are available for download for 7 days.
To permanently delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. This action is irreversible and all data is purged within 30 days per our retention policy.
Two-factor authentication (2FA) can be enabled in Settings > Security. We support authenticator apps (TOTP) and SMS-based codes.
To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. A reset link is emailed to your registered address and expires after 1 hour.
Team seats can be added under Settings > Team > Invite Members. Pro plans include 5 seats; additional seats are $10/month each. Enterprise seat pricing is custom.
We support integrations with Slack, Zapier, Google Sheets, and Salesforce. Integrations are configured under Settings > Integrations and require admin permissions.

Our platform maintains a 99.9% uptime SLA on Pro and Enterprise plans. Status updates are posted at status.example.com. Enterprise customers receive SLA credits for downtime beyond the guaranteed threshold.
Billing cycles run monthly or annually, selectable at signup or in Settings > Billing. Annual billing includes a 15% discount compared to monthly billing.
Refunds are available within 14 days of a charge for annual plans and within 7 days for monthly plans. Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-10 business days.
Our mobile app is available for iOS and Android and supports core features including notifications, task viewing, and commenting. Full admin controls require the web app.
